mapper.insert: insert into borrow_records(reader_id, book_id, borrow_request_id, status, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{reader.id}, #{book.id}, #{borrowRequest.id}, #{status}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{returnDate}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.select: select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id where br.reader_id = #{readerId} and br.deleted = false order by br.id desc

select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id where br.id = #{id} and br.deleted = false

select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id where br.status = 'RETURN_PENDING' and br.deleted = false order by br.id asc

select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id where br.deleted = false order by br.id desc
mapper.update: update borrow_records set status = #{status}, borrow_date = #{borrowDate}, due_date = #{dueDate}, return_date = #{returnDate}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT b.id as bookId, b.title, b.author, c.name as categoryName, COUNT(br.id) as borrowCount FROM borrow_record br JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN category c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE br.status IN ('BORROWED', 'RETURNED', 'RETURN_PENDING') GROUP BY b.id, b.title, b.author, c.name ORDER BY borrowCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

choose.when: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') as period, COUNT(CASE WHEN borrow_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as borrowCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as returnCount FROM borrow_record WHERE borrow_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY period DESC LIMIT 12
choose.otherwise: SELECT CONCAT(YEARWEEK(borrow_date), '周') as period, COUNT(CASE WHEN borrow_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as borrowCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN return_date IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) as returnCount FROM borrow_record WHERE borrow_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY YEARWEEK(borrow_date) ORDER BY period DESC LIMIT 12
